ORDER SHORTENING TIME RE: MOTION TO RESTORE ACTION TO THE TRIAL CALENDAR, MOTION FOR EXPEDITED JURY TRIAL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-15-2011 IN 206, DEFENDANT REGINO IGNACIO'S JOINDER IN MOTION TO RESTORE ACTION TO TRIAL CALENDAR AND FOR EXPEDITED JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THIS IS THE LEAD CASE OF A CONSOLIDATED MATTER AND THE LEAD CASE WAS INADVERTENTLY DISMISSED AT THE TIME THAT THE OTHER CASE IN THIS CONSOLIDATION WAS DISMISSED. THE COURT ORDERED TO RESTORE THIS MATTER ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR BASED UPON UNOPPOSED MOTION AND PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF PARTIES TO A TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 11/7/11 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. A STIPULATED CONSENT ORDER FOR EXPEDITED JURY TRIAL WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
